Bug / Task Description: katz_centrality produces a plausible-looking score map but the ranking is inverted on directed graphs: in a simple chain the source ends up scoring highest and the sink lowest, the opposite of correct Katz centrality. The defect is in which endpoint of each edge accumulates a neighbor's score during propagation.
Commit Subject: fix(scoring): accumulate Katz influence from in-neighbors, not out-neighbors
